\tzpentry{ID3505}{Chemical Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3505 introduces Chemical Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\nT^{\\mu\\nu}_{\\rm EM} = g^{\\mu\\alpha}g^{\\nu\\beta}F_{\\alpha\\rho}F_{\\beta}{}^{\\rho} - \\tfrac{1}{4}g^{\\mu\\nu}F_{\\alpha\\beta}F^{\\alpha\\beta}.\n\\]
